leadText: A Persim Berry (Japanese: キーのみ Kī Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation III. It is the spiritual successor of the Bitter Berry from Generation II, having an identical effect when used on or by a Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.2 Bag item 1.3 Ingredient 1.4 Exchange 1.4.1 Generation IV 1.4.2 Pokémon Dream World 1.4.3 Generation VIII Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] If the holder is confused , it will consume its held Persim Berry and cure it of confusion. When forcibly consumed via Fling , Pluck , Bug Bite , or Item Urge , it also cures the consumer of confusion. Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures that Pokémon of confusion . This consumes the Persim Berry. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending R S E When blending with NPCs, Persim Berries will produce the following Pokéblocks : NPC NPCs' Berries Flavors ( 100 RPM ) Feel 1 NPC Sweetness 12 28 2 NPCs Sweetness 10, Sourness 10 29 3 NPCs Sweetness 10, Spiciness 10 30 Blend Master Sweetness 38, Bitterness 12 31 OR AS Persim Berries are pink Berries that have a very low chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Berry Crush FR LG E Persim Berries have a base Berry Powder of 30 and a difficulty of 50. With two players, this Berry will contribute 60 units of Berry Powder at 100% silkiness. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Persim Berries will produce Poffins with Sweetness 9 and smoothness 19 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Persim Berries are pink Berries in Group 1. Composting X Y Persim Berries are pink Berries. Dye Houses S M US UM 15 Persim Berries, Pecha Berries , and Mago Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into pastel pink. Curry Sw Sh Persim Berries have a rarity of 1. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Persim Berries are Ground-type items and give 2 points towards the output value. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Platinum , the player can exchange Persim Berries for accessories at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop : 1 Persim Berry for a Black Specs Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Persim Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Plain Catalogue Leafy Plant 65 Persim Berries 65 Sitrus Berries Plain Catalogue Bolt Rug 35 Persim Berries 35 Figy Berries Plain Catalogue Log Cabin 150 Persim Berries 150 Aspear Berries 150 Sitrus Berries Plain Catalogue Mirror Ball 20 Persim Berries 10 Qualot Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Clefairy Doll 50 Persim Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Elekid Doll 50 Persim Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Pansear Doll 50 Persim Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Minccino Doll 50 Persim Berries Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , the player can exchange Persim Berries for Stickers at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop : 3 Persim Berries for Party Sticker B

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Persim Berries raise Snorlax's Strength, doubling the effect if the Berry is Snorlax's favorite. The base amount of Strength raised by the Berry is determined by the level of the helper Pokémon that gathered it.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A hold item that heals confusion in battle. FR LG When held by a Pok é mon , it will be used in battle to lift confusion. D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. It may be used or held by a Pokémon to recover from confusion. HG SS It may be used or held by a Pokémon to recover from confusion. B W B2 W2 If held by a Pokémon, it recovers from confusion. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can recover from confusion on its own in battle. S V If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of confusion. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 08 Size: 1.9" (4.7 cm) Firmness: Hard Games Description R S E Loves sunlight. The Berry 's color grows vivid when exposed to the sun. D P Pt BD SP The more this berry absorbs energy from sunlight, the more vividly colorful it grows. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A Berry with a unique flavor. It doesn't have a dry taste, so it's actually easy to use for cooking. A ripe Persim Berry has a bright color.

Nuzleaf and Grumpig in Ultra Space Wilds US UM ) Held by wild Drampa (5% chance) M UM Sw Sh Berry trees ( Routes 3 , 5 , and 6 , Rolling Fields , Dappled Grove , North Lake Miloch ) Held by wild Drampa (5% chance) Sh Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Fields of Honor ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Foot ) BD SP Solaceon Town , Pastoria City , and Route 218 Route 208 ( Berry Master 's house) S V Alfornada ( Emotional Spectrum Practice ) Tera Raid Battles (1★, 2★) Sparkling overworld item ( Pokémon League , South Province (Area One) , South Province (Area Two) ) S V TM Sparkling overworld item ( Mossfell Confluence , Oni Mountain , Wistful Fields ) S V ID Sparkling overworld item ( Savanna Biome ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Berry Set United Kingdom, Taiwan November 18, 2022 to March 7, 2023 As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period B W Powerful Tag Lucario Japanese June 1 to 22, 2012 X Y OR AS Yokohama Pikachu Japan August 8 to 16, 2015 OR AS Beginner Trainer Pikachu South Korea October 9 to 11, 2015 October 17 to 18, 2015 Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation III Planted 0 hours Sprouted 3 hours Taller 6 hours Flowering 9 hours Berries 12 hours A Persim plant will yield 2-3 Berries. Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours A Persim plant will yield 2-5 Berries. A growing Persim plant's soil dries by 15% every hour, fully drying out in 7 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 18 hours Berries 24 hours A Persim plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Growing 8 hours Bigger 12 hours Budding 16 hours Bloom 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Persim plant will yield 4-15 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 1, and removing a pest adds 3. Persim plants attract Spewpa as pests. If grown next to each other, a Chesto Berry and a Persim Berry may mutate into a Kelpsy Berry . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours A Persim plant will yield 4-20 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Persim plant will yield 4 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 8 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 12 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours A Persim plant will yield 2-5 Berries.
